## TRM1.2. Terminal capacity incentive scheme

In the first year of RP4, with an ATFM arrival delay of 2.07 min/arr, Switzerland **did not achieve the national target** of 1.60 min/arr. However, the pivot value for incentives (0.20 min/arr) is limited to CRSTMP delay causes. As CRSTMP delay of 0.22 min/arr falls within the malus sliding range for the incentive scheme, the NSA calculates a **financial penalty** of CHF 150,503.73.
